entities.name: Cognitive Bootstrapping via Test Preparation
entities.context: Framework positioning standardized test prep as genuine developmental skill-building that teaches transferable thinking patterns

entities.name: transferable cognitive modality
entities.context: A way of thinking under constraint that generalizes beyond the specific test context

entities.name: SAT
entities.context: Standardized test that rewards problem-solving approach distinct from recall-based K-12 assessment

entities.name: American K-12 curricula
entities.context: Educational system characterized by recall-based assessment (memorize and regurgitate)

entities.name: pattern recognition
entities.context: Core skill rewarded by standardized tests, part of the transferable cognitive modality

entities.name: strategic elimination
entities.context: Core skill rewarded by standardized tests, part of the transferable cognitive modality

entities.name: time-boxed reasoning
entities.context: Core skill rewarded by standardized tests, reasoning under time constraint

entities.name: recall-based assessment
entities.context: Dominant assessment approach in American K-12 emphasizing memorization and regurgitation
